raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find /var/log/* older than 1 day and tar.gz. Command: tar czf logs.tar.gz --newer-mtime='1 day ago' /var/log/*. But need all files older than one day. Use find. tar czf logs.tar.gz $(find /var/log -type f -mtime +0 -mtime -1?) Actually older than one day: -mtime +0? That means modified more than 24h ago. So: tar czf logs.tar.gz $(find /var/log -type f -mtime +0). Use -print0 and xargs. Simpler: tar czf logs.tar.gz $(find /var/log -type f -mtime +0). Provide command.

So: tar czf logs.tar.gz $(find /var/log -type f -mtime +0). Use -print0 and xargs. Simpler: tar czf logs.tar.gz $(find /var/log -type f -mtime +0). Provide command.
